name: webos-terminal
description: Native terminal emulator for LG webOS TVs
author: webOS Homebrew

scripts.pack: node scripts/sync-version.js && enact pack && node scripts/downlevel-syntax.js && node scripts/prune-dist.js && npm run pack-legacy && node scripts/inject-legacy-boot.js
scripts.pack-p: node scripts/sync-version.js && enact pack -p && node scripts/downlevel-syntax.js && node scripts/prune-dist.js && npm run pack-legacy && node scripts/inject-legacy-boot.js
scripts.build: npm run pack-p && npm run build-service
scripts.build-service: mkdir -p dist/services/bin && cp services/shell_service.js services/services.json services/package.json dist/services/ && cp services/bin/ptybridge-* dist/services/bin/ 2>/dev/null || true
